case_title: TEICHOLZ, LESLIE VS STRAUSZ, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT STRAUSZ, MICHAEL THE CHUK W. KWAN MARGARETA C. KWAN FAMILY TRUST OF 8/3/92 HEARING SET FOR JAN-26-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FILE MOTION TO VACATE TO VACATE (FOR COMPUTER PURPOSES) IN ORDER TO DISMISS ACTION PER STIP. OF PARTIES & ORDER SIGNED BY COMM
STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE FILED. SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEICHOLZ, LESLIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRAUSZ, MICHAEL THE CHUK W. KWAN MARGARETA C. KWAN FAMILY TRUST OF 8/3/92 $673.60 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $719.60, THE CLAIM AGAINST MARGARETA KWAN IS AMENDED TO REFLECT DEFT'S CORRECT NAME: THE CHUK W. KWAN AND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MARGARETA KWAN C. FAMILY TRUST OF 8/3/92. THE CLAIM AGAINST CHUK KWAN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLFT'S REQUEST.
